verdicts.issue: Confirmed: Xie, Koyejo, Gupta, arXiv:1903.03934 (v5 2020-12-05). Minor: entry uses `date` instead of `year` field; bibtex prefers `year` for citation rendering.

Confirmed: Xu, Evans, Qi, NDSS 2018, DOI 10.14722/ndss.2018.23198. Minor: entry has both `journal` and `booktitle` (NDSS 2018 is a conference, so @inproceedings would be cleaner than @article). Also missing `year` field (only `date`).

Author/venue mismatch. The actual paper 'Edge Intelligence: Architectures, Challenges, and Applications' is by Dianlei Xu, Tong Li, Yong Li, Xiang Su, Sasu Tarkoma, Tao Jiang, Jon A. Crowcroft, Pan Hui (arXiv:2003.12172, 2020). The entry's author list (Xu Xiaolong, Li Fan, Zhang Wei, He Liang, Li Ruidong) and venue (IEEE IoT Journal vol 8 no 6 pp 4229-4249) do not match this title. Also key uses uppercase 'X' breaking the lowercase-key convention used elsewhere in the bib.

suggested_fix.note: Rename key to lowercase xu2020edge AND replace metadata: author = {Xu, Dianlei and Li, Tong and Li, Yong and Su, Xiang and Tarkoma, Sasu and Jiang, Tao and Crowcroft, Jon A. and Hui, Pan}, year = 2020, journal/eprint to arXiv:2003.12172. Update every [@Xu2021edge] / @Xu2021edge reference in book/quarto/contents/**/*.qmd.

verdicts.issue: Confirmed: Yao, A. C., 'Protocols for secure computations', 23rd Annual Symposium on Foundations of Computer Science (SFCS), IEEE 1982, DOI 10.1109/SFCS.1982.38.
Confirmed: Y.C. Yeh, 'Triple-triple redundant 777 primary flight computer', IEEE Aerospace Applications Conference 1996, DOI 10.1109/AERO.1996.495891.

Confirmed: Yin, Chen, Ramchandran, Bartlett, ICML 2018, PMLR v80, pp 5650-5659. Minor venue-expansion gap per bib-check.md §2: booktitle is 'International Conference on Machine Learning' but should be 'International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML)' for consistency with other entries.
Confirmed: Yoo, Jette, Grondona, 'SLURM: Simple Linux Utility for Resource Management', JSSPP 2003, Springer LNCS, DOI 10.1007/10968987_3.

Content is correct (You, Gitman, Ginsburg, arXiv:1708.03888, LARS) but bibtex type is wrong. Marked as @inproceedings with no real venue (booktitle is itself an arXiv ID string). Should be @misc or @article with archivePrefix=arXiv. Currently has both `journal` and `booktitle` set to the same arXiv ID, plus publisher='arXiv'.

suggested_fix.note: Convert to @misc or change booktitle/journal to a real venue (the paper was never formally published; ICLR workshop submissions referenced this preprint). Drop redundant journal field.

verdicts.issue: Confirmed: You, Li, Reddi, Hseu, et al., LAMB optimizer, ICLR 2020. Minor venue-expansion gap per bib-check.md §2: booktitle is 'International Conference on Learning Representations' but should be 'International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR)'.

Confirmed: Yu, Jeong, Kim, Kim, Chun, OSDI '22, USENIX, pp 521-538. Minor venue-expansion: the redundant `journal = {OSDI}` field should be removed (entry is @inproceedings; the booktitle already has the full venue).

Citation is real (Journal of Risk Model Validation 14(4), 89-100, Dec 2020, DOI 10.21314/JRMV.2020.227) but the entry is missing volume=14, number=4, and pages=89--100. Has stray `school = {Western Michigan University}` field which is non-standard for @article (this came from the author's WMU dissertation work but doesn't belong on the journal entry).

suggested_fix.note: Add volume = {14}, number = {4}, pages = {89--100}, year = {2020}. Remove the `school` field (or move to a separate @phdthesis entry if the dissertation itself is also cited).

verdicts.issue: Confirmed: Zafrir, Boudoukh, Izsak, Wasserblat, EMC2-NIPS 2019 workshop, IEEE, pp 36-39, DOI 10.1109/EMC2-NIPS53020.2019.00016. Minor: missing `year` field (only `date`).

Confirmed: NSDI 2012, USENIX, pp 15-28, Best Paper. Minor: canonical author list per USENIX/scholar is 'Murphy McCauley' (not 'McCauly') — entry has the correct spelling 'McCauley'. All authors match.

Confirmed: 'Apache Spark: a unified engine for big data processing', CACM 59(11), Nov 2016, pp 56-65, DOI 10.1145/2934664. Author list and metadata all match. Subtitle stored separately in `subtitle` field which is acceptable.

Confirmed: Zaharia et al., 'Accelerating the Machine Learning Lifecycle with MLflow', IEEE Data Engineering Bulletin 41(4), Dec 2018, pp 39-45. URL p39.pdf at sites.computer.org matches. (Already stamped citation-audit-2026-05 not the claude/gemini stamps so still in scope.)

Confirmed: Hongyu Zhang, 'On the Distribution of Software Faults', IEEE TSE 34(2), Mar/Apr 2008, pp 301-302 (a brief contribution). Minor: author is given as 'Hongyu Zhang' (first-last single string) instead of 'Zhang, Hongyu' (Last, First) which is the consistent format used everywhere else in the bib. Also missing `year` field.

Confirmed: Zhang, Bengio, Hardt, Recht, Vinyals, ICLR 2017 (best paper). Note key year 2016 vs entry year 2017 — acceptable preprint-vs-conference gap (arXiv 2016, ICLR 2017), within the 1-year tolerance per bib-check.md §5. Minor venue-expansion gap: booktitle should include '(ICLR)'.
Confirmed: Zhang, Gu, Basu, Garg, IEEE VTS 2018, pp 1-6, DOI 10.1109/VTS.2018.8368656. Minor: missing `year` field (only `date = 2018-04`).
Confirmed: Zhang, Rangineni, Ghodsi, Garg, DAC 2018, IEEE, DOI 10.1109/DAC.2018.8465918. Minor: missing `year` field (only `date = 2018-06`).
Confirmed: Zhao, Li, Lai, Suda, Civin, Chandra, arXiv:1806.00582 (CoRR). Minor: entry mixes @article + journal=CoRR + booktitle=arXiv string — should pick one form. Missing explicit `year` field.
Confirmed: Mark Zhao, G. Edward Suh, IEEE S&P 2018, pp 229-244, DOI 10.1109/SP.2018.00049.

DUPLICATE of zhao2023pytorch. Both entries describe the same paper: 'PyTorch FSDP: Experiences on Scaling Fully Sharded Data Parallel', VLDB 2023, vol 16(12), pp 3848-3860, DOI 10.14778/3611540.3611569. Identical author list, identical metadata. One must be removed and any [@zhao2023fsdp] / [@zhao2023pytorch] citations consolidated to a single canonical key.

suggested_fix.note: Delete one of the two duplicate entries (recommend keeping zhao2023fsdp as the more descriptive key). Then update every [@zhao2023pytorch] and @zhao2023pytorch reference in book/quarto/contents/**/*.qmd to use [@zhao2023fsdp].

verdicts.issue: DUPLICATE of zhao2023fsdp (see that entry's verdict). Same DOI 10.14778/3611540.3611569, same authors, same VLDB 2023 metadata. Recommend deleting this entry in favor of zhao2023fsdp.

suggested_fix.note: Delete this entry. Update every [@zhao2023pytorch] / @zhao2023pytorch citation in book/quarto/contents/**/*.qmd to point at [@zhao2023fsdp].

verdicts.issue: Confirmed: Zhou, Han, Morariu, Davis, CVPR 2018, pp 1053-1061, DOI 10.1109/CVPR.2018.00116. Minor: missing `year` field. Venue per bib-check.md §2 should ideally be 'IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)' (entry just says 'IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition' without the (CVPR) suffix).
Confirmed: Zhu, Eran, Firestone et al., 'Congestion Control for Large-Scale RDMA Deployments', ACM SIGCOMM 2015, CCR 45(4), pp 523-536, DOI 10.1145/2829988.2787484.

Confirmed: Zhu, Liu, Han, 'Deep Leakage from Gradients', NeurIPS 2019, vol 32, pp 14747-14756. Minor venue-expansion gap per bib-check.md §2: booktitle should be 'Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS)' (entry omits the (NeurIPS) suffix).

Confirmed: J.F. Ziegler et al., 'IBM experiments in soft fails in computer electronics (1978-1994)', IBM Journal of Research and Development 40(1), Jan 1996, pp 3-18, DOI 10.1147/rd.401.0003. Minor: missing `year` field (has `date = 1996-01`).

DUPLICATE of zoph2017neural. Both describe the same paper: Zoph & Le, 'Neural Architecture Search with Reinforcement Learning', arXiv:1611.01578 (Nov 2016) / ICLR 2017. zoph2016neural is @inproceedings with year=2017 and booktitle 'ICLR'; zoph2017neural is @article with year=2016 and journal 'ICLR'. Both URLs resolve to the same paper. Confusingly, the key year and entry year are swapped between the two (zoph2016neural says 2017, zoph2017neural says 2016). One must be deleted.

suggested_fix.note: Delete zoph2017neural (the @article variant; ICLR is a conference, not a journal). Keep zoph2016neural since the preprint year 2016 better matches H&P-style 'when the work first appeared' convention. Update every [@zoph2017neural] and @zoph2017neural reference in book/quarto/contents/**/*.qmd to use [@zoph2016neural]. Also fix zoph2016neural's `year` field to 2016 (preprint) or align with the standard convention used elsewhere in this bib.

verdicts.issue: DUPLICATE of zoph2016neural (see that entry). Marked as @article with journal='International Conference on Learning Representations' which is wrong — ICLR is a conference, not a journal. Recommend deleting in favor of zoph2016neural.

suggested_fix.note: Delete this entry. Update every [@zoph2017neural] / @zoph2017neural citation in book/quarto/contents/**/*.qmd to point at [@zoph2016neural].

verdicts.issue: Confirmed: Zu et al., 'Resiliency at Scale: Managing Google's TPUv4 Machine Learning Supercomputer', NSDI '24, USENIX, Apr 2024, pp 761-774. URL and authors match official USENIX page.
